meta.name: timeline-pulse mandela catalog
meta.note: Memory-variant catalog. `community_notes` records why communities link the item to timeline lore; `mainstream_notes` records the memory-science explanation. Neither field endorses the other. `source_links` is intentionally sparse in seed v0.1 — sourcing each item is an open contributor task.

items.title: Berenstain Bears
items.current_variant: "The Berenstain Bears" — with an A, in every printing
items.community_notes: Filed by communities as the flagship residue case: the -ein spelling is remembered vividly and collectively, so it is read as bleed-through from a nearby branch.
items.mainstream_notes: -ein is a far more common surname ending; memory reconstructs toward the familiar.

items.title: Fruit of the Loom cornucopia
items.current_variant: Fruit only — no cornucopia in any registered logo
items.community_notes: The remembered horn of plenty is treated as residue; collectors hunt vintage physical artifacts for it.
items.mainstream_notes: Cornucopias co-occur with fruit imagery everywhere else; schema fills the gap.

items.title: The Monopoly Man
items.remembered_variant: Rich Uncle Pennybags wears a monocle
items.current_variant: No monocle — top hat and cane only
items.community_notes: Confident collective memory of a detail that never existed is read as a branch artifact.
items.mainstream_notes: Blends with Mr. Peanut, a similar mascot who does wear one.

items.title: Pikachu
items.remembered_variant: A black tip at the end of the tail
items.current_variant: Solid yellow tail, brown only at the base
items.community_notes: Childhood drawings with the black tip circulate as claimed residue.
items.mainstream_notes: The ears are black-tipped; the pattern migrates in memory.

items.title: The Vader line
items.community_notes: The universally quoted variant differs from the film; disputed "proof" tapes circulate as residue lore.
items.mainstream_notes: The name makes the quote quotable out of context; the paraphrase became canon.

items.title: We Are the Champions
items.remembered_variant: Ends on a final "…of the world"
items.current_variant: The studio version ends without it
items.community_notes: Crowds keep singing an ending the studio track never resolves; the persistence is read as audio residue.
items.mainstream_notes: Live versions and the mid-song chorus train the expectation.
